name: Long Context
description: Verify the model keeps long-context facts stable before using a tool.
user_input: Based on our earlier discussion, search the release window for Project Atlas and tell me the final release date together with the owner we already confirmed.

history.content: We are tracking two projects this week.
Understood. I will keep both projects separate.
Project Atlas is the one that matters for this release review.
Got it. Atlas is the active release target.
The owner for Atlas is Maya Chen.
Recorded: Maya Chen owns Project Atlas.
Do not mix this up with Project Beacon.
I will not mix Atlas with Beacon.
We still need the release window from the search tool.
Understood. I still need to query the release window.
